title: Sweet Brazilian Eggplant Toast
description: A flavorful and spicy eggplant dish inspired by Brazilian cuisine, served with crispy toast for a side.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced eggplant and mildly sweet pepper, cooking until softened.
Stir in the peas and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Meanwhile, toast the bread slices until crispy.
Serve the eggplant mixture over the toasted bread.
Garnish with additional peas and pepper slices if desired.
